brief_justification: Gets exactly $5,158 through correct month-by-month computation matching the ground truth; goes one level beyond surface by noting the payment can never overcome interest+fee but explores no second-order effects; proceeds linearly without questioning assumptions or potential misinterpretations of the problem setup; shows all intermediate steps in a table but never cross-checks from a different angle or tests boundary conditions; states the answer with full confidence and never acknowledges interpretation ambiguities (e.g., rounding during months, exact timing semantics); never considers alternative interpretations of fee application order or timing rules; full table with every intermediate value allows complete reproduction of the derivation by any third party
